text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ugh! How did I lose AGAIN?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Like, what's wrong with me? Not enough grit?
Hard work? Luck? Am I just not cut out for this?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And I said I was gonna become the "real me."
God, I'm such a loser.
choice_data_list: Don't panic—things will turn out okay.

I thought your style was to never give up, no
matter how it makes you look!

I thought your style was to never give up, no
matter how it makes you look!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And I said I was gonna become the "real me."
God, I'm such a loser.
choice_data_list: Don't panic—things will turn out okay.

I thought your style was to never give up, no
matter how it makes you look!

I thought your style was to never give up, no
matter how it makes you look!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...No, you're right. I just don't want everyone
thinking that racing is just my side hustle.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I also don't have the patience—I have to win the next race.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Maybe a little panicking could do me some good.
I'll train like hell, then prove just how fast I can be
next race!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...Haha. If this were a modeling gig, nobody
would ever suggest that not caring how I look is
"my style."

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But it's true—I've been such a loser. If I carry on
like this, people are gonna stop caring about me.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And I won't be ignored. I'll win the next race and turn all their heads again!
